_comment: Config for the SVG radial context menu. Replaces build toolbar and action panels.

appearance._comment_innerRadius: dp — dead zone at center (prevents accidental selection)

colors._comment_petalFill: Same dark translucent as HUD panels

toneOverrides._comment: Certain action categories use different accent colors

_comment_contexts: Contexts are now populated dynamically by radialProviders.ts — each system registers what actions it can provide. See src/systems/radialProviders.ts.
